english_text: I should not have said that
I am so sorry for what I did
I wish I could take it back
I keep thinking about what happened
I should have listened to you
I hurt someone I care about
I should have been more careful
I did not appreciate what I had
I will never do that again
I was wrong and I know it
If I could go back in time
I did not mean to hurt you
I feel like a bad person
I will make up for it
I carry this guilt every day
Nothing I do can fix this
I will live with this regret
I wish I was braver back then
I am trying to forgive myself
I need to let go of the past
At least I learned from it
I will carry this memory forever
I hope you can forgive me someday
korean_text: 언젠가 용서해 줄 수 있길 바라
romanization: eonjenga yongseohae jul su itgil bara
